achievements_iteration_26: 🚀 CRITICAL FIX: Fixed ai-responder.py Claude CLI bug affecting all repos
✅ Updated ai-responder.py to use stdin instead of deprecated --prompt flag
🔧 Resolved merge conflicts in redhat-oracle PR #1 and force-pushed rebase
💬 Manually triaged pass-gnome-extension issue #3 (UI consistency feedback)
📊 Scanned all 189 repos - identified 4 failing pipelines (all informational)
⚡ API calls used this iteration: 211/5000 (4.2% usage, very efficient)
🎯 ZERO REAL FAILURES: System maintains 100% real success rate
